       <script>
    $(document).ready(function() {
       
        $('#search-input-new').on('keyup', function() {
            let query = $(this).val();
            console.log("Search query:", query);

           
            if (query.length >= 3) {
                $.ajax({
                    url: "https://www.callezee.com/search/suggestions",
                    method: 'GET',
                    data: {
                        query: query
                    },
                    beforeSend: function() {
                        console.log("Sending AJAX request to fetch suggestions...");
                    },
                    success: function(data) {
                        console.log("Received response:", data); 
                        let suggestions = $('#suggestions');
                        suggestions.empty(); 

                       
                        if (data.length > 0) {

                            console.log("Suggestions available, displaying list...");
                            suggestions.show();

                            
                            $.each(data, function(index, value) {
                                suggestions.append('<div class="suggestion-item">' + value + '</div>');
                                console.log("Added suggestionaa:", value); 
                            });
                        } else {
                            console.log("No suggestions found.");
                            suggestions.hide();
                        }
                    },
                    error: function(xhr, status, error) {
                      
                        console.error("AJAX Error - Status:", status, "Error:", error);
                        console.log("Response Text:", xhr.responseText);
                    },
                    complete: function() {
                        console.log("AJAX request completed."); 
                    }
                });
            } else {
                console.log("Query too short, hiding suggestions."); 
                $('#suggestions').hide(); 
            }
        });

       
        $(document).on('click', '.suggestion-item', function() {
            let selectedValue = $(this).text();
            console.log("Selected suggestion:", selectedValue);
            $('#search-input-new').val(selectedValue); 
            $('#suggestions').hide(); 
              $('.searchformDiv').submit();
        });
    });

    <script>
        
        $(document).ready(function () {

    $('#contactForm').on('submit', function (e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        let valid = true;

        // Name
        const name = $('#name').val().trim();
        if (name === '') {
            $('#name').addClass('is-invalid');
            valid = false;
        } else {
            $('#name').removeClass('is-invalid').addClass('is-valid');
        }

        // Email
        const email = $('#email').val().trim();
        const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
        if (!emailRegex.test(email)) {
            $('#email').addClass('is-invalid');
            valid = false;
        } else {
            $('#email').removeClass('is-invalid').addClass('is-valid');
        }

        // Mobile
        const mobile = $('#mobile_number').val().trim();
        const mobileRegex = /^[0-9]{10}$/;
        if (!mobileRegex.test(mobile)) {
            $('#mobile_number').addClass('is-invalid');
            valid = false;
        } else {
            $('#mobile_number').removeClass('is-invalid').addClass('is-valid');
        }

        // Message
        const message = $('#comments').val().trim();
        if (message === '') {
            $('#comments').addClass('is-invalid');
            valid = false;
        } else {
            $('#comments').removeClass('is-invalid').addClass('is-valid');
        }

        if (!valid) return;

        // reCAPTCHA v3 token then submit
        $('button[type=submit]').prop('disabled', true).text('Submitting...');

        grecaptcha.ready(function () {
            grecaptcha.execute('6Lf8HPcsAAAAABupGp0tDpXj5dxrI4LSeD3gNJbo', { action: 'contact' })
                .then(function (token) {
                    $('#recaptcha_token').val(token);
                    document.getElementById('contactForm').submit();
                });
        });
    });

    // Clear validation on input
    $('#contactForm input, #contactForm textarea').on('input', function () {
        $(this).removeClass('is-invalid is-valid');
    });

});
        
        
        document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-number-button').forEach(function(button) {
            button.addEventListener('click', function() {
                const mobileNumber = button.getAttribute('data-mobile-number');
                const businessId = button.getAttribute('data-business-id');

                const updateMobileCountUrl = "https://www.callezee.com/update-mobile-count";

                fetch(updateMobileCountUrl, {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: {
                            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                            'X-CSRF-TOKEN': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')
                                .getAttribute('content')
                        },
                        body: JSON.stringify({
                            business_id: businessId
                        })
                    })
                    .then(response => {
                        if (!response.ok) {
                            throw new Error('Network response was not ok');
                        }
                        return response.json();
                    })
                    .then(data => {
                        if (data.success) {
                            console.log('Mobile count updated successfully');
                        } else {
                            console.error('Failed to update mobile count');
                        }
                    })
                    .catch(error => console.error('Error:', error));

                const modalBody = document.querySelector('#mobileId');
                if (modalBody) {
                    modalBody.innerHTML = `
                <b><i class="fa fa-phone">  </i></b>
                <a href="tel:${mobileNumber}">  <b>${mobileNumber}</b></a>
            `;
                }

                const modalElement = document.getElementById('numberModal');
                if (modalElement) {
                    modalElement.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');
                    const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalElement);
                    modal.show();

                    modalElement.addEventListener('hidden.bs.modal', function() {
                        modalElement.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
                    });
                }
            });
        });


        document.querySelectorAll('.whatsapp-number-button').forEach(function(button) {
            button.addEventListener('click', function() {
                const whatsappNumber = button.getAttribute('data-whatsapp-number');
                const businessId = button.getAttribute('data-business-id');

                const updateWhatsappCountUrl = "https://www.callezee.com/update-whatsapp-count";

                fetch(updateWhatsappCountUrl, {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: {
                            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                            'X-CSRF-TOKEN': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')
                                .getAttribute('content')
                        },
                        body: JSON.stringify({
                            business_id: businessId
                        })
                    })
                    .then(response => {

                        const contentType = response.headers.get('content-type');
                        if (!contentType || !contentType.includes('application/json')) {
                            throw new Error(
                                'Expected JSON response but received HTML or other content');
                        }
                        return response.json();
                    })
                    .then(data => {
                        if (data.success) {
                            console.log('Mobile count updated successfully');
                        } else {
                            console.error('Failed to update mobile count:', data.message);
                        }
                    })
                    .catch(error => console.error('Error:', error));



                const whatsappUrl = `https://wa.me/${whatsappNumber}`;
                window.open(whatsappUrl, '_blank');
            });
        });


        function getLocalitiesByCity(cityName) {
            if (cityName) {
                $.ajax({
                    url: '/get-localities-by-city/' + cityName,
                    type: 'GET',
                    success: function(response) {
                        $('#locality').empty();
                        $('#locality').append('<option value="">--None--</option>');

                        $.each(response, function(index, locality) {
                            $('#locality').append('<option value="' + locality.locality + '">' +
                                locality.locality + '</option>');
                        });
                    }
                });
            } else {
                $('#locality').empty();
                $('#locality').append('<option value="">--None--</option>');
            }
        }
    </script>

    <script>
        var selectedRating = 0;


        var userHasRated = false;

        if (!userHasRated) {
            $('.star').on('mouseover', function() {
                var value = $(this).data('value');
                console.log("Mouse over star with value: " + value);
                highlightStars(value);
            });

            $('.star').on('mouseout', function() {
                console.log("Mouse out from stars, selected rating: " + selectedRating);
                highlightStars(selectedRating);
            });

            $('.star').on('click', function() {
                selectedRating = $(this).data('value');
                console.log("Star clicked, rating selected: " + selectedRating);

                $('#reviewModal').attr('data-rating', selectedRating);

                var reviewModal = new bootstrap.Modal($('#reviewModal'));
                reviewModal.show();
            });
        } else {
            // Optional: apply disabled style
            $('.star').css({
                'pointer-events': 'none',
                'opacity': '0.5',
                'cursor': 'not-allowed'
            });
        }


        function highlightStars(count) {
            $('.star').removeClass('active');
            $('.star:lt(' + count + ')').addClass('active');
        }
        $('.star').on('click', function() {
            selectedRating = $(this).data('value');
            console.log("Star clicked, rating selected: " + selectedRating);
            $('#reviewModal').attr('data-rating', selectedRating); // store in modal
            var reviewModal = new bootstrap.Modal($('#reviewModal'));
            reviewModal.show();
        });

        $('#submitReviewBtn').on('click', function() {
            var reviewText = $("#review").val();

            var rating = $('#reviewModal').data('rating');
            if (!reviewText) {
                alert('Please enter your review!');
                return;
            }


            if (!isLoggedIn()) {

                alert('You must be logged in to submit a review!');
                return;
            }

            $.ajax({
                url: "https://www.callezee.com/store-review",
                type: "POST",
                data: {
                    review: reviewText,
                    business_id: "100943",
                    _token: $('input[name="_token"]').val(),
                    rating: rating,

                },
                success: function(response) {
                    if (response.success) {
                        Swal.fire({
                            title: 'Success!',
                            text: 'You have successfully rated.',
                            icon: 'success',
                            confirmButtonText: 'OK'
                        }).then((result) => {
                            if (result.isConfirmed) {
                                location.reload(); // refresh the page
                            }
                        });
                    } else {
                        Swal.fire({
                            title: 'Error!',
                            text: 'Something went wrong. Please try again.',
                            icon: 'error',
                            confirmButtonText: 'OK'
                        });
                    }
                },

                error: function(xhr) {
                    console.log('Error:', xhr);
                }
            });

        });

        function isLoggedIn() {
            return false;
        }



        $(document).ready(function() {
            if (window.location.hash === '#reviewModal') {
                console.log("Hash indicates that the modal should open.");
                var reviewModal = new bootstrap.Modal($('#reviewModal'));
                reviewModal.show();
            }
        });
    </script>

    function getDetailsOld(id)

          $.get(url, function(data) {
                $('.businessdata').html(''); // Clear existing content
        
                if (data) { // Check if data exists
                    $('.businessTitle').text(data.business_name);
        
                    var html = `
                        <p><b><i class="fa fa-paper-plane"></i>  </b>${data.city_name}</p>
                        <p><b><i class="fa fa-map-marker"></i>  </b>${data.locality} - ${data.pin_code}</p>
                        <p><b><i class="fa fa-map-pin"></i>  </b>${data.address}</p>
                    `;
        
                    $('.businessdata').html(html);
                } else {
                    $('.businessdata').html('<p>No data found</p>');
                }
            });
    }
    function getDetails(id) {
        var url = 'https://www.callezee.com/getData/' + id;
        $.get(url, function(data) {
            $('.businessdata').html('');
            $('.map-section').html('');
            if (data != 0) {
                var row = JSON.parse(data)
                console.log(row);
                $('.businessTitle').text(row.business_name);
                var html = ` <p><b><i class="fa fa-paper-plane">  </i></b>` + row.city_name + `</p>
                    <p><b><i class="fa fa-map-marker">   </i></b>` + row.locality + ' - ' + row.pin_code + `</p> 
                    <p><b><i class="fa fa-map-pin">    </i></b>` + row.address + `</p>`;
                var html1 = `  <iframe 
                    src="https://www.google.com/maps?q=${row.latitude},${row.longitude}&hl=es;z=14&output=embed" 
                    width="100%" height="350" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy"
                    referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>`;
            }
            $('.businessdata').html(html);
            if (row.latitude && row.longitude) {
                $('.map-section').html(html1);
            }
        })
    }
